changes.before: That was what made it possible.
A city afraid for its trade did not sleep; it narrowed its eyes and kept counting.
Jaina could not see her, which usually meant no one else would until it was too late.
changes.after: Cyndia was gone.

changes.before: At first Jaina had read it as reserve. Then as discipline. Tonight it read as readiness so complete it made speech feel wasteful.
changes.after: The stillness Jaina had first mistaken for reserve now read as readiness.

changes.before: It felt exactly like putting a hand over a bell as it began to ring.
changes.after: Like a hand over a bell.

changes.before: Jaina saw the first quick searches go across his face
changes.after: His gaze flicked over window, door, rafters

changes.before: That chilled her more than panic would have.
Jaina had begun to understand that this, more than menace, was what made Sylvanas difficult to resist.
Jaina saw it because Sylvanas had made the room so still there was nothing else to look at.
You don't answer to a committee.
changes.after: You don't answer to a crowd.

changes.before: the host trigger separated from the carrier work, the route discipline, the response lanes
changes.after: the host trigger kept away from the carrier work. The routes stay clean. Men wait when anything goes wrong.

changes.before: That landed. She saw it land.
changes.after: The words hit.

changes.before: He had not been promised glory. He had been promised inclusion, perhaps. Proximity. The privilege of serving brilliance.
changes.after: His contempt cracked. Not glory. Inclusion, perhaps. Proximity. The privilege of serving brilliance.

changes.before: He made one soft sound, not even a cry, and every muscle in his body seized at once.
changes.after: He made one soft sound, and every muscle in his body seized.

changes.before: It was a different use of her gift, one she would have called inelegant a week ago. Now it seemed like survival wearing an honest face.
changes.after: A week ago she would have called it inelegant. Tonight it was survival.

changes.before: Standing doctrine, Jaina thought.
changes.after: Standing orders, Jaina thought.

changes.before: Something in that steadied her more than praise could have done.
changes.after: That steadied her more than praise would have.

changes.before: a woman staring at them over her own hand before common sense told her to get down
changes.after: a woman frozen behind her own hand

changes.before: the ugly peace of a problem no longer solvable
changes.after: the ugly peace of a dead end

changes.before: Not improvised. Not a frightened local cell thrashing because we touched the wrong man.
changes.after: He was lost the instant he missed his report window, and they already had lanes in place to close the district around the failure.

changes.before: And a security doctrine.
changes.after: And men with standing orders.

changes.before: The words sat in the cellar like a weight lowered carefully to the floor.
the day's evidence at last stripped of any flattering lie
changes.after: Jaina looked at the map, at the room beneath it, at the whole city under her hands

changes.before: not because she needed to prove it now but because the body insisted on finishing what the mind had already accepted
Jaina let out a slow breath and hated that too
changes.after: Jaina pressed her mouth shut.

changes.before: The cellar changed around the word.
changes.after: Jaina did not move. For one heartbeat she could not.

changes.before: The name had not lived in her mind for years, not as anything active.
changes.after: The name had not been active in her mind for years.

changes.before: She had spent days recognizing intelligence in the work without wanting to see whose kind of intelligence it was.
changes.after: She had spent days recognizing the intelligence in the work without wanting to see whose it was.

changes.before: all the academic padding had gone out of his voice. No lecture. No careful preface.
changes.after: When Antonidas spoke again, every last piece of academic padding was gone. No lecture. No careful preface.

changes.before: The cellar seemed smaller after that, as if the silence he had left behind had taken space with it.
something in her chest loosened anyway
changes.after: the knot under her ribs eased

changes.before: They had the name now. They had the shape of the hand on the work. They also had the bitterer thing...
changes.after: They had the name now. They had the mind on the work. They also had the bitterer thing...

flags: Canon check passed: Jaina, Antonidas, Kel'Thuzad, Andorhal, and Eastweald usage aligns with Third War sources.
Line 65: kept 'preserving shell' in Jaina dialogue because the voice sheet explicitly permits it in full mage register.
Line 111: kept 'Field necromancers' because it reads as Jaina's operational shorthand in-scene, not planner jargon.
